description: LinkedIn authentication and RSS adapter integration — Playwright browser auth, rss.app feed bridge, Phoenix REST endpoints, LiveView settings panel, SwiftUI auth banner and authority row integration

stories.title: LinkedIn RSS adapter + Playwright auth in fetch.py
stories.description: Add linkedin-rss adapter to scripts/fetch.py for rss.app feed URLs. New scripts/linkedin_auth.py (516 lines) with Playwright browser auth and cookie persistence. Added playwright>=1.40.0 to requirements.txt.
acceptanceCriteria: linkedin-rss adapter handles rss.app URLs in fetch.py

stories.title: Phoenix LinkedIn auth endpoints + LiveView settings panel
stories.description: New linkedin_auth.ex Elixir module. REST endpoints POST /api/authorities/linkedin/auth and GET /api/authorities/linkedin/auth-status. Authority controller enhanced with LinkedIn auto-detect. LiveView settings panel with auth UI.

stories.title: SwiftUI LinkedIn auth banner + authority row integration
stories.description: LinkedInAuthStatus Codable model. APIClient linkedInAuthStatus() and linkedInAuth() methods. LinkedInAuthBannerView component. Enhanced AuthorityRowView with LinkedIn-aware sync controls. SearchViewModel LinkedIn auth state management.
acceptanceCriteria: API client methods for LinkedIn auth
ViewModel manages async auth check/authenticate flows
